message:
test(proptest): add 37 property tests for explainability_console (ft-3681t.9.7)

Covers serde roundtrips, severity ordering, console ingestion invariants,
capacity eviction, query filtering, telemetry consistency, correlation
grouping, causal links, policy decision severity mapping, and rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
